_comment: Synthetic engagement files (metadata + short content excerpt). FILE-002 (engagement budget) is restricted to leadership + the lead consultant; FILE-003 (commercial rate card) is restricted to leadership only — both demonstrate file-level permission trimming.

files.name: Brightwater Statement of Work (SOW) v3.docx
files.summary: The Brightwater statement of work, version 3. Defines the in-scope deliverables: data migration cutover, integration test report, and training. The self-service reporting module is NOT listed and is therefore out of scope.
files.content_excerpt: Section 2 Deliverables: (D1) data migration cutover; (D2) integration test report; (D3) user training. Section 5: any work not listed in Section 2 requires an approved change request.

files.name: Brightwater Engagement Budget & Utilisation.xlsx
files.summary: Engagement budget and utilisation summary. Brightwater is over plan: budget consumed 86% against 70% of timeline; the cutover slip and any unfunded reporting-module scope would push it into overrun.
files.content_excerpt: Brightwater | Budget 1.20M | Spent 1.03M (86%) | Forecast at completion 1.28M (over) | Status: Over plan. Note: reporting-module scope must be funded via change request.

files.name: Meridian Commercial Rate Card (confidential).pdf
files.summary: Confidential commercial rate card and margin floors used to price change requests. Restricted to delivery leadership.
files.content_excerpt: [RESTRICTED — commercial terms] Blended day-rate and margin-floor table used to estimate change-request pricing.
